specDomains.purpose: Manages reading, writing, and merging configuration files for openlore and OpenSpec.
Handles interactions with language model providers (Gemini, Anthropic, OpenAI-compatible) to process chat messages and tool calls.

insertionPoints.name: createLLMService
insertionPoints.rationale: Highest-leverage point: every caller passes through this factory. Wrap the returned LLMService with a rate-limited proxy here.

insertionPoints.name: fetchWithRetry
insertionPoints.rationale: Alternative: instrument at the HTTP boundary if rate-limit needs awareness of provider-specific tokens-per-minute rather than per-call counts.
